title: Classification Definitions
description: Shared classification definitions for Atomic Reference Strategy. Used by both roadmap milestones and decision events to ensure consistency across the platform planning lifecycle.

Classification.description: Atomic Reference Strategy classification for milestones and decisions

enumDescriptions.LEAD: Primary deliverable - direct outcome of intentional work. LEAD items are the source of truth that DERIVED items depend on. Changes to LEAD items propagate downstream.
enumDescriptions.DERIVED: Dependent on LEAD items - computed, generated, or consequential. DERIVED items automatically update when their LEAD dependencies change.
enumDescriptions.EXTERNAL: From outside sources - regulatory requirements, third-party integrations, market conditions. EXTERNAL items are inputs that the team cannot directly control.
enumDescriptions.FLEXIBLE: Can vary based on context - approach decisions, optional enhancements. FLEXIBLE items allow exploration without violating architectural constraints.

AuthorityLevel.description: Authority level definition for platform decision cascade

role.description: Role name for this authority level

maxEffortHours.description: Maximum effort hours this level can authorize (or 'unlimited')

scopeLimit.description: Maximum scope this level can affect

patternConfidenceRequired.description: Minimum pattern match confidence to authorize without escalation

explorationPermitted.description: Whether this level can authorize novel exploration

MonitoringTrigger.description: Early warning condition for proactive intervention

threshold.description: Threshold value that triggers the action

action.description: Action to take when threshold is breached

checkIntervalMs.description: How often to check this trigger (milliseconds)

PatternMatch.description: Reference to a Success Stack pattern match

sourceOfTruth.description: File path that defines this node
